RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Denied. There are triable issues whether the bus driver and the police officer acted negligently and whether such negligence caused Plaintiff's injuries. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
